hypothesis: A small non-zero trend Industrials risk sleeve may recover missed upside from no_shares events without reopening full-size drag.
why_tested: Entry skip oracle showed trend_industrials_risk_multiplier_applied=0.0 had 3 no_shares samples with positive forward upper-bound returns, including one DE sample with +19.1548% max forward return.
rejection_reason: All non-zero trend Industrials multipliers improved only the late_strong window and materially regressed both mid_weak and old_thin. The apparent DE upside is not stable enough to justify reopening the sleeve.
next_do_not_repeat: Do not retest a broad non-zero trend Industrials multiplier without a narrower context filter that explains why mid_weak and old_thin Industrials trend entries failed.
